name: Cream Cheese Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat butter and cream cheese together at medium speed with an electric mixer for 2 minutes or until creamy.
2. Gradually add sugar, beating for 5 to 7 minutes.
3. Add eggs one at a time, stirring just until the mixture is smooth.
4. Stir in vanilla extract.
5. In a separate bowl, combine flour and salt.
6. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the butter mixture, beating at low speed after each addition until well blended.
7. Pour the batter into a greased and floured 10-inch tube pan.
8. Fill a 2-cup, ovenproof measuring cup with water and place it in the oven with the cake pan.
9. Bake at 300°F for 1 hour and 30 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
10. Allow the cake to cool in the pan on a wire rack for 10 to 15 minutes.
11. Remove the cake from the pan and let it cool completely on a wire rack before serving.
